front: What is the mechanism of cysteine protease specificity?
back: Cysteine proteases (papain, cathepsins, caspases) use a Cys-His catalytic dyad. Substrate specificity is determined by S1-S4 pockets. Caspases recognize Asp at P1 position. Cathepsins have broader specificity. Inhibitors include E-64 and viral cystatins.
